title: Report Categorization - Cofense Triage v3
content:
Report Categorization playbook investigates reports that are unprocessed or uncategorized on Cofense Triage as incident alerts in XSOAR and categorizes them based on the severity of the incident.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cofense pack (CofenseTriage, partner-supported).

Use cases: Phishing.

Inputs — OnCall: Set to true to assign only user that is currently on shift. Requires Cortex XSOAR v5.5 or later.; ReportID: Requires report ID to investigate and categorize the report that is pulled from Cofense Triage.; AutoCategorize: Whether the user wants to categorize the report automatically or not.; MaliciousCategory: The category to be assigned to the report if it is malicious.; NonMaliciousCategory: The category to be assigned to the report if it is non-malicious..

Integrations/scripts used: AssignAnalystToIncident, CheckEmailAuthenticity, ParseEmailFiles, cofense-category-list, cofense-report-categorize, cofense-report-download, rasterize-email, rasterize-image.

        returns them to the war room. The incident labels themselves are preserved
        and not modified - only the "Label/x" context items that originated from the
        labels, and the best practice is to rely on these for the remainder of the
        playbook.

    note: false

    ignoreworker: false

    - incidentfield: Cofense Triage Report Attachment Information
      output:
        complex:
          root: File
          filters:
          - - operator: inList
              left:
                value:
                  simple: File.Name
                iscontext: true
              right:
                value:
                  simple: Email.AttachmentNames

          - operator: ConvertKeysToTableFieldFormat
